message:
Add vendored mux client with connection pooling and compression, and runtime config extensions

vendored/mux_client.rs: new module implementing vendored mux socket
client infrastructure with connection pooling across sharded socket
paths, configurable compression support, health checking, and graceful
connection lifecycle management (+135 lines). Provides the client-side
counterpart to the vendored mux sharding configuration wired in the
previous main.rs commit.

vendored.rs: re-exported mux_client module from the vendored subsystem.

runtime.rs: extended RuntimeConfig with vendored_mux_socket_paths
(Vec<PathBuf>) and vendored_mux_compression fields, wiring the
vendored mux client configuration into the runtime initialization
pathway so distributed agent and watcher modes can establish pooled
connections to sharded mux socket endpoints.

.beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
